commitResults.messageTitle: feat: refresh assessment and grade panels after add/remove operations
commitResults.messageBody:
Updates addassessment, removeassessment, addgrade, and removegrade so the UI switches to the correct panel and immediately shows the latest data after a successful command.

Refactors listassessments/listgrades flow and model filtering helpers so panel state stays consistent when the underlying assessment or grade data changes.

Improves assessment duplicate detection by comparing canonical assessment names, ensuring true duplicates such as Quiz 1, Quiz1, and quiz1 are treated as the same assessment instead of relying on similarity-based checks.
feat: refresh assessment and grade panels after add/remove operations
